function_definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_user_role()
 RETURNS text
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  select role
  from profiles
  where id = auth.uid();
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.handle_new_user_profile()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
begin
  insert into public.profiles (id, email, full_name, role, is_active)
  values (
    new.id,
    new.email,
    coalesce(new.raw_user_meta_data->>'full_name', new.email),
    'seller',
    true
  )
  on conflict (id) do nothing;

  return new;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.refresh_mv_sales_by_product()
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
begin
  refresh materialized view public.mv_sales_by_product;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.set_order_totals()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
declare
  v_order_id uuid;
begin
  v_order_id := coalesce(new.order_id, old.order_id);

  update public.orders o
     set subtotal = coalesce((
           select sum(oi.subtotal)
           from public.order_items oi
           where oi.order_id = v_order_id
         ), 0),
         grand_total = coalesce((
           select sum(oi.subtotal)
           from public.order_items oi
           where oi.order_id = v_order_id
         ), 0)
         - coalesce(o.discount_amount, 0)
         + coalesce(o.shipping_amount, 0)
         + coalesce(o.tax_amount, 0),
         total = coalesce((
           select sum(oi.subtotal)
           from public.order_items oi
           where oi.order_id = v_order_id
         ), 0)
         - coalesce(o.discount_amount, 0)
         + coalesce(o.shipping_amount, 0)
         + coalesce(o.tax_amount, 0),
         updated_at = now()
   where o.id = v_order_id;

  return null;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.set_purchase_order_totals()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
declare
  v_purchase_order_id uuid;
begin
  v_purchase_order_id := coalesce(new.purchase_order_id, old.purchase_order_id);

  update public.purchase_orders po
     set subtotal = coalesce((
           select sum(poi.subtotal)
           from public.purchase_order_items poi
           where poi.purchase_order_id = v_purchase_order_id
         ), 0),
         total = coalesce((
           select sum(poi.subtotal)
           from public.purchase_order_items poi
           where poi.purchase_order_id = v_purchase_order_id
         ), 0)
         - coalesce(po.discount_amount, 0)
         + coalesce(po.shipping_amount, 0)
         + coalesce(po.tax_amount, 0),
         updated_at = now()
   where po.id = v_purchase_order_id;

  return null;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.sync_inventory_from_order_status()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
begin
  if tg_op <> 'UPDATE' then
    return new;
  end if;

  if new.order_status = old.order_status
     and new.point_of_sale_id is not distinct from old.point_of_sale_id
     and new.warehouse_id is not distinct from old.warehouse_id
     and new.user_id is not distinct from old.user_id then
    return new;
  end if;

  if new.order_status = 'Cancelado' then
    delete from public.inventory_movements im
    using public.order_items oi
    where oi.order_id = new.id
      and im.reference_type = 'ORDER_ITEM_STOCK'
      and im.reference_id = oi.id;

    return new;
  end if;

  insert into public.inventory_movements (
    user_id,
    product_id,
    point_of_sale_id,
    movement_type,
    qty,
    reference_type,
    reference_id,
    notes,
    variant_id,
    warehouse_id
  )
  select
    new.user_id,
    oi.product_id,
    new.point_of_sale_id,
    'SALE',
    oi.qty,
    'ORDER_ITEM_STOCK',
    oi.id,
    'Stock reservado automático desde order_items',
    oi.variant_id,
    new.warehouse_id
  from public.order_items oi
  where oi.order_id = new.id
    and not exists (
      select 1
      from public.inventory_movements im
      where im.reference_type = 'ORDER_ITEM_STOCK'
        and im.reference_id = oi.id
    );

  update public.inventory_movements im
     set user_id = new.user_id,
         point_of_sale_id = new.point_of_sale_id,
         warehouse_id = new.warehouse_id,
         updated_at = now()
  from public.order_items oi
  where oi.order_id = new.id
    and im.reference_type = 'ORDER_ITEM_STOCK'
    and im.reference_id = oi.id;

  return new;
end;
$function$
